name: Negal the Loner

sheet.name: Negal the Loner
sheet.background_story:
- Only die can heal your sad. - 

Negal is the one who keeps alone in The Forsaken Lands. He watched the Church of her burnt and selected the side of The Coil of Abyss - The Nameless Serpent. And he survived in the War. 

Then Negal started to be close with a group of pilgrims and joined the Second Expedition to The Abyss. But unfortunately, Negal didn't survive this time. Down to the Void and become a part of the Void.
